# JAOT

> JAOT is an AI-powered optimization platform and model marketplace where businesses,
> developers, and students can formulate, solve, and analyze optimization problems
> without deep mathematical expertise. Build optimization models with AI assistance,
> browse solver-agnostic marketplace models, or connect AI agents via the Model
> Context Protocol (MCP).

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](/docs/getting-started/introduction): Platform overview and first steps
- [Quick Start](/docs/getting-started/quick-start): Solve your first optimization problem

## API Reference

- [Solve API](/docs/api/solve): Submit and retrieve optimization problems programmatically
- [Models API](/docs/api/models): Browse and activate marketplace models

## MCP Integration

- [MCP Overview](/docs/mcp/overview): Connect AI agents (Claude, GPT-4) to the solver via MCP

## Marketplace

- [Browse Models](/marketplace): Ready-made optimization models across 10 problem categories
- [Publishing Models](/docs/marketplace/publishing-models): List your optimization model in the marketplace

## Pricing

- [Plans](/pricing): Free to start with 20,000 credits; buy more credits as needed
